summary: Role 5 retrieval/RAG quality review completed. Verdict is REVISE_REQUIRED because current RAG status is healthy only for deterministic canaries/local text-hashing vectors, while the candidate plan must explicitly require real semantic embeddings and Ragas-like answer-quality evaluation before P1-10 can be accepted as complete.
decisions: Return REVISE_REQUIRED for P1-10/RAG quality unless the plan adds acceptance criteria for semantic embedding provider/index, bounded dense top-K, honest retrieval mode gating, and answer-quality evaluation beyond expected memory-path retrieval.
Do not treat local_text_hashing_v1 dense vectors as a completed semantic embedding provider.
Keep current rag_eval_status healthy as retrieval-canary evidence only, not final OS behavior-quality evidence.
next_steps: Update the unfinished improvement plan/document so P1-10 requires provider-backed multilingual embeddings or explicitly named local embedding model, dense canary coverage, rank-fusion/reranker metrics, and Ragas-like answer quality metrics.
Make rag_proof_status non-final or warning-visible while semantic_embedding_provider is false.
Add memory-on/off generated-answer evaluation with faithfulness, relevance, correctness, grounding, forbidden-facet, and latency metrics.
